description:
Upon BMS_CellOV_Flag = 1, the BMS shall:
  · Broadcast BMS_CellOV_Warn = 1 on CAN ID 0x180 at 100 ms periodicity
  · Reduce charge current target to 50 % of nominal

IF  calculated SOC <= 20 %
THEN
  · BMS_LowSOC_Warn := 1
  · Command instrument cluster low battery lamp ON

IF  cumulative charge throughput exceeds design cycle limit
THEN
  · BMS_SOHEstFault_Flag := 1
  · Trigger SOH re-calibration request

The BMS shall monitor the HV interlock loop continuously.
IF  HVIL circuit is interrupted
THEN  BMS_HVILFault_Flag := 1
  · All HV contactor closure prohibited
The BMS shall monitor each cell voltage against the overvoltage threshold. BMS_CellOV_Detect shall be set to 1 when any cell voltage >= r_CellOV_Threshold.

IF  pack discharge current exceeds 200 A
THEN
  · BMS_DischargeOC_Flag := 1
  · Limit discharge power to 75 % of MaxDischargePower

IF  calculated SOH <= 80 %
THEN
  · BMS_BatteryDegrade_Warn := 1
  · Store DTC P0A0F in non-volatile memory

The pack voltage sensor shall be cross-checked against the sum of all cell voltages.
IF  deviation > 5 V
THEN  BMS_PackVoltSensorFault_Flag := 1

IF  max cell voltage delta >= 50 mV AND SOC > 30 %
THEN
  · Activate passive cell balancing
  · Select cells with highest voltage for discharge

While BMS_Fault_Latch = 1:
  · All contactor closure prohibited
  · Normal operation blocked until power cycle
  · Fault code readable via diagnostic interface
A current sensor self-test shall be performed during each power-up initialisation. The test shall inject a known reference and verify within 2 % accuracy.

While BMS_CANFault_Flag = 1:
  · Essential sensor inputs shall continue to be monitored
  · Basic safety functions shall be maintained
  · IF CAN communication restored AND fault cleared
    THEN resume normal operation

IF  total pack voltage < minimum operating threshold
THEN
  · BMS_PackUV_Flag := 1
  · Send DTC P0A01 to VCU
  · Limit discharge power proportionally to undervoltage severity

Recovery from overvoltage safe state:
IF  BMS_SystemState = SafeState AND all cell voltages < 4.00 V for >= 5 s
THEN
  · BMS_OV_RecoverAllow := 1

IF  BMS_CellOV_Detect de-asserts before t_CellOV_Debounce expires
THEN
  · The debounce timer shall reset
  · BMS_CellOV_Flag shall remain 0
  · No fault record shall be stored

The following data shall be logged for each balancing event:
  · Balancing start and end timestamps
  · Cells balanced and discharge duration per cell
  · Cell voltage delta before and after balancing

IF  unrecoverable internal fault detected
THEN
  · Transition to SafeState
  · Open all contactors
  · BMS_Fault_Latch := 1
  · Broadcast fault status on CAN

IF  any cell temperature sensor >= 55 C
THEN
  · BMS_CellOT_Flag := 1
  · Store DTC in non-volatile memory

When BMS_SystemState = Standby AND no CAN activity for configurable timeout:
  · Enter low-power sleep mode
  · Quiescent current minimized
  · Wake-up capability shall be maintained (CAN, wake pin)

IF  pack discharge current >= 300 A for >= 10 ms
THEN
  · BMS_SCD_Flag := 1
  · Open both main contactors immediately
  · BMS_SystemState := SafeState
